note: RIGDROP — dark-neon battlestation giveaway. Stills via fal flux-pro/v1.1-ultra; looping video via fal Kling then tools/vidkit.py web + poster. Logo + image-CTA + headline via fal ideogram/v3. Cutouts via fal flux-pro then fal bg removal (tools/fal.py bg) + imgkit alpha. Every scene/product prompt = brand.json.styleSignature + subjectPrompt, seed 80517 unless noted.

assets.subjectPrompt: a complete high-end gaming battlestation glowing in a dark room: a custom tempered-glass PC tower with vivid RGB fans, a huge curved ultrawide monitor showing an abstract neon game, mechanical keyboard and mouse on a desk mat, a sleek racing-style gaming chair, hovering volumetric haze, intense cyan and magenta edge lighting, cinematic hero composition with negative space upper-left for a headline

subtle looping RGB color cycle on the PC fans and keyboard, slow neon light pulse, drifting haze and dust particles, faint monitor glow flicker, gentle parallax push-in; no camera cuts; seamless 5s loop

bold uppercase display headline text 'WIN THE ULTIMATE BATTLESTATION' on three tight lines, chrome-and-neon extruded letters with cyan and magenta edge glow, slight upward angle, plain pure-white background, no other objects
assets.note: Ideogram varies; regenerate until spelling is perfect. Keep an sr-only h1 + alt text.

assets.subjectPrompt: horizontal esports logo lockup on flat mid-gray: glossy 3D downward-chevron drop emblem fused with a hex power core in cyan+magenta neon on the LEFT, bold uppercase white wordmark 'RIGDROP' on ONE line to its right; only that word
assets.post: fal bg ; imgkit alpha --pad 6 ; imgkit crop emblem -> favicon
